ques: Pack 24 circles in a circle radius r. Compare Densest known packing and Square packing. Then tell me the radius of the inner circles.
answer: For 24 circles packed in a circle of radius r — Densest known packing: inner circle radius ≈ 0.176939 r (filled fraction 75.14%); Square packing: inner circle radius ≈ 0.163961 r (filled fraction 64.52%, 7.33% smaller than densest).
